name: ao-personal-os
description: AO-Personal-OS local plugins. Currently: the gated Telegram channel fork used by the telegram-chat bridge.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Fork of telegram@claude-plugins-official 0.0.6 with the TELEGRAM_CHANNEL_POLL single-poller gate — only the bridge session (run.sh) may claim Telegram's one getUpdates consumer slot; all other sessions run tools-only. See automations/telegram-chat/README.md 'Single-poller invariant'.
